name: jmdict-sqlite
description: Read-only SQLite database for JMDict and Kanjidic, a Japanese-English dictionary.
author: Sean McBroom (sean.mcbroom@outlook.com)

engines.yarn: yarn is not supported. Please use npm

scripts.create-release:deploy: npm run clean:all && npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=deploy VERBOSE=true node dist/src/index.js
scripts.dev: npm run clean:data-sqlite && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VERBOSE=true tsx src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run clean:build && npm run clean:data-sqlite && tsc && tsc-alias && npm run copy:test-files-to-dist
scripts.test: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test node dist/test/runner.js
scripts.test:deploy: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=deploy node dist/test/runner.js
scripts.clean:build: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:data-sqlite
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:data-sqlite && npm run clean:data-jmdict && npm run clean:data-kanjidic
